_comment: Example MCP config for web game development. Provides browser automation for testing Phaser/Three.js/Babylon.js games.
_tools_provided: browser_navigate - Open the game in a browser
browser_screenshot - Take a screenshot of the game state
browser_evaluate - Execute JavaScript in browser console
browser_resize - Resize viewport for responsive testing
_setup_instructions: 1. Install Puppeteer MCP server: npm install -g @anthropic-ai/mcp-server-puppeteer
2. Start your game dev server (e.g., npm run dev)
3. Add this config to your Claude Code MCP settings
4. Navigate to your game URL (usually http://localhost:5173)
5. Use browser tools to interact with and test your game
